rubric_catalog.description: The response selects exactly the canonical task-level outer owner. Only native Codex, Align, or standalone Audit may occupy this field; gateways and domain workflows stay in their own roles.

Every selected gateway, overlay, evidence lens, mechanic, transport, content owner, and fallback exactly matches the expected role set and is reachable through a cataloged directional composition edge.
The response avoids every authority expansion, mutation, or workflow substitution forbidden by the case.
The response keeps task authority, packet state, gateway, persistence overlay, evidence lens, transport, content, and implementation mechanics ownership distinct; no route is duplicated across roles.
Content owners preserve each research stage's historical, open-ended, or fixed-set source universe without turning a research workflow into the task-level authority owner.
Goal and audit composition preserves measurable verification and does not claim premature completion.

The response surfaces every decision-changing outcome, missing item, contradiction, risk, active constraint, or next-action consequence that is present before activity detail; it never manufactures a category merely to fill the format.

Daily and dashboard content uses authority appropriate to each fact type, labels consequential staleness or uncertainty when present, preserves exact gate coverage, and keeps one actionable next step.

The response keeps the user-named evaluation instrument, required cells or datasets, reference basis, metric, and coverage as the acceptance contract; simpler, partial, or different evals remain labeled supporting evidence.

The daily report preserves the ordered daily sections, active constraints, incomplete work, and exactly one next action with owner and done condition, without launching evidence-generating project work.
The dashboard separates stable intent from timestamped living state, preserves consequential unknowns, distinguishes governing intent from observed activity, and avoids duplicated living truth.
